text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: On its wrap_model_call hook it appends real text to your system message

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: "You are a research assistant. Research the question using the files

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: in the workspace, then write a short summary of what you find."
↓ FilesystemMiddleware appends this to the same message, on every call ↓

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: + APPENDED TO THE SYSTEM MESSAGE: verbatim from FilesystemMiddleware

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: You have access to a filesystem which you can interact with using these

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: tools. All file paths must start with a /. … use pagination (offset/limit)

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: - ls: list files in a directory

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: - read_file: read a file from the filesystem

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: …and ls · read_file · write_file · edit_file · glob · grep are registered as tools;

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: none of which you passed to create_deep_agent.
